data.title: Citrea ZK-rollup launch tests BTC scalability; a live experiment in DeFi and stablecoins with limited block space.
data.description: Citrea's implementation of a Bitcoin rollup is now actively testing BTC's capability to accommodate a complete DeFi and stablecoin infrastructure. This serves as a live assessment of how much complexity the base layer of Bitcoin can effectively anchor.

data.title: Aprea Therapeutics announces $5.6M private placement, selling 6,288,857 shares at $0.89 each with warrants.
data.description: Aprea Therapeutics, Inc. has recently engaged in a private placement aimed towards selling 6,288,857 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants), along with warrants for the purchase of up to the same number of shares, to a mix of healthcare institutional investors and certain insiders, generating approximately $5.6 million in total. Each share is priced at $0.89 while the warrants possess an exercise price of $0.765 per share, being exercisable upon issuance and expiring two years from the registration statement’s effectiveness date. The move is a strategic effort by Aprea to bolster its development of novel cancer treatments designed to target cancer cell vulnerabilities primarily, thus ensuring minimal impact on healthy cells.

data.title: SeaStar Medical (Nasdaq: ICU) to present at Noble Capital Markets Conference on Feb 5th at 11:30 am ET. CEO Eric Schlorff to speak.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, SeaStar Medical Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: ICU), a healthcare company targeting critical care patients with organ failure, revealed that Eric Schlorff, the CEO, will speak at Noble Capital Markets’ Emerging Growth Virtual Equity Conference on February 5, 2026, at 11:30 am ET. SeaStar aims to revolutionize treatments for critically ill patients and potentially save lives.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Vistagen Therapeutics investors between April 1, 2024 and December 16, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in securities litigation, is urging investors affected by Vistagen to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained Vistagen securities from April 1, 2024, to December 16, 2025, and wish to explore your options, contact him directly to discuss your situation.

data.title: Xerox reports 25.7% yoy revenue growth to $2.03B in Q4, missing analyst estimates. Adjusted loss of 10 cents per share.
data.description: Xerox Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: XRX) released its fourth-quarter fiscal results, showcasing a 25.7% increase in revenue year-over-year to $2.03 billion. This figure fell short of the estimated $2.11 billion. On a constant currency basis, revenue increased by 23.6%. The company reported an adjusted loss of 10 cents per share, missing analysts' anticipated 10-cent profit. Equipment segment sales saw a 23.4% rise while post-sale revenue, covering services, consumables, and financing, increased by 26.5%. The gross margin decreased by 250 basis points to 28.6%, with equipment gross margin dropping by 1,540 basis points to 12.0% and post-sale margin rising by 130 basis points to 33.7%. Adjusted operating income also experienced a decrease.

data.title: Healthcare Triangle Inc. partners with Better.care to expand health data platform services across EMEA markets. HCTI becomes preferred provider in Europe, Southeast Asia, Middle East, and Africa.
data.description: An alliance has established Healthcare Triangle as the top service provider in rapidly expanding healthcare sectors in Europe, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa. The collaboration, announced on January 29, 2026, in Pleasanton, California, involves Healthcare Triangle, Inc. (Nasdaq: HCTI), a prominent figure in the industry. This strategic move sets HCTI as the preferred service provider within the mentioned regions, maximizing its presence in key healthcare markets.

data.title: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026, with a conference call at 10:00 AM ET.
data.description: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) announced that it will reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 5, 2026, before the market opens. Following this, the Company will conduct a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the outcomes with investors. data.title: Ghanem Company introduces fractional ownership of real estate in KSA through REGA Sandbox in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
data.description: In Saudi Arabia, Ghanem Company has introduced fractional ownership of real estate through the REGA Sandbox initiative. This new offering allows individuals to own a portion of property, making real estate investment more accessible. Fractional ownership enables multiple investors to share ownership of a single property, lowering the barrier to entry for those looking to invest in the market. This innovative approach aims to attract investors looking to diversify their portfolios and participate in the lucrative real estate sector in KSA.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) will report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb. 13, 2026. Webcast/conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Marcus & Millichap, a prominent commercial real estate brokerage firm, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 13, 2026. The report will cover the period ending December 31, 2025. Prior to the market opening on the same day, the Company plans to unveil these results. Additionally, they will conduct a webcast and conference call at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time to converse about the findings.

data.title: UAE launches central bank-approved stablecoin USDU, backed by reserves from major banks, competing with USDC.
data.description: Universal Digital Intl Limited introduced USDU, the UAE's inaugural central bank-approved stablecoin, challenging Circle's USDC. This marks Universal Digital as the premier entity registered by the Central Bank of the UAE to issue a Foreign Payment Token, as per The Block. USDU is supported by reserves in dollars at key UAE banks like Emirates NBD, Mbank, and Mashreq. Circle, the issuer of USDC, obtained a license from Abu Dhabi Global Market in December for its operations.
